title: ZELEX Declarative Configurator Spec
description: A data-driven specification a configurator UI is GENERATED from (not hand-coded against). Each axis declares its control, type, option source, provenance, and price effect. A buyer's selections form a 'build document' that resolves — through the declarations in `derivations` — to a catalogued body architecture, a SKU, a measurement signature, a Body Family, and a price. See docs/pdr/PDR-011-declarative-configurator.md. Large option sets are referenced by data source rather than inlined, so the catalog stays the single source of truth.

measurements.note: spec-card measurements — source of truth for the signature

profiles.note: WHR/BWR + Body Family classification per body_code

provenance_legend.catalog: Enumerated directly from catalogued product data.
provenance_legend.spec-card: Read from db/body_measurements.json once a body_code resolves; not buyer-editable.
provenance_legend.derived: Computed by a rule in `derivations`; never stored as input.
provenance_legend.proposed: A real ZELEX option not yet structured in db/. Flagged so the team can decide to backfill it before this axis goes live.

groups.label: Body Architecture
groups.intent: Selectors that RESOLVE to one catalogued architecture. They are filters, not free composition — every valid combination must map to an existing body_code (or be flagged bespoke).

axes.label: Series / Line
axes.note: Drives the body_code prefix and the head-pool naming grammar.

axes.label: Height
axes.exclude_reason: Torso / mini bodies are out of scope (is_torso filter in build_characters.py).
axes.note: Resolves with line+cup to a body_code. Not all heights exist for all lines.

axes.label: Material
axes.note: Catalog titles mark K/I/Fusion as Silicone; SLE skews TPE. Material is a price driver.

axes.label: Skeleton Version
axes.note: Only meaningful for the SLE line; appears in SKU suffix (…-Sle3.0).

axes.label: Measurement Signature
axes.note: Locked to the resolved body_code. Read-only — the buyer picks an architecture, not loose tape measures.

axes.label: Head
axes.note: 163 distinct heads in catalog; rendered as an image gallery filtered to the line, not a 163-row dropdown.

axes.label: Jaw / Face Build

resolves.Movable Jaw: appends MJ face_code (e.g. GE46MJ) per db/product_overrides.json

axes.note: ~50 catalog variants carry a Movable-Jaw face_code. Availability depends on head_code.

axes.label: Match head tone to body
axes.note: When true, head skin_tone follows the body skin_tone component; otherwise selectable independently.

axes.label: Skin Tone
axes.note: From live_variants tone field (Tan 228, Fair 72, White 23 SKUs); resolves into the SKU suffix (…-Tan).

axes.label: Breast Build
axes.note: 15 catalog SKUs reference an implant/gel build; offered where the body supports it.

axes.label: Standing Feet (foot bolts)
axes.note: PROPOSED — a real ZELEX option not yet in db/. Backfill a per-body 'standing' flag before enabling.

axes.label: Articulated Fingers
axes.note: PROPOSED — needs a per-body capability flag in db/ before going live.

derivations.rule: code = code_prefix(line) + height_cm + cup; lookup must exist in db/body_measurements.json#/bodies. If absent, set body_code=null and raise the `bespoke_combination` validation flag.

WHR = waist/hip; BWR = upper_bust/waist; choose the family whose whr_range and bwr_range both contain the point (db/body_profiles.json#/families). On no exact containment, pick nearest range-center and label confidence near|loose (see db/family_taxonomy.json#/confidence_labels).
derivations.note: Prefer the precomputed value at db/body_profiles.json#/profiles[body_code] when present; recompute only for bespoke combinations.

derivations.rule: sku = head_code [ + '(' + faceMJ + ')' if Movable Jaw ] + '+' + body_code [ + '-' + skin_tone ] [ + '-Sle' + version for SLE ]. Match against db/live_variants.json#/sku for an exact catalogued SKU.
If resolved.sku matches a live variant, use its price (authoritative). Otherwise estimate: base_by_line × material_factor × (1 + family_premium). Mark estimated:true.

pricing_model.note: Premiums mirror db/body_profiles.json. Catalogued SKU price always wins over the estimate.

validation.message: This line + height + cup is not a catalogued architecture. Treat as a bespoke inquiry, not an instant SKU.

validation.when: face_variant == 'Movable Jaw' and head_code has no MJ face_code in product_overrides
validation.message: Selected head has no Movable-Jaw build.
Skeleton version applies to the SLE line only.
Torso / mini bodies are out of scope.
This line is in development — route to notify-me, not checkout (see PDR-003).

build_document_schema.$comment: JSON Schema a saved build is validated against. Inputs only — derived fields live in `resolved` and are recomputed, never trusted from input.
